root_text.an5.77:1.1: “Pañcimāni, bhikkhave, anāgatabhayāni sampassamānena alameva āraññikena bhikkhunā appamattena ātāpinā pahitattena viharituṁ appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāya.
root_text.an5.77:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, āraññiko bhikkhu iti paṭisañcikkhati:
root_text.an5.77:2.4: Ekakaṁ kho pana maṁ araññe viharantaṁ
root_text.an5.77:2.5: ahi vā maṁ ḍaṁseyya, vicchiko vā maṁ ḍaṁseyya, satapadī vā maṁ ḍaṁseyya,
root_text.an5.77:2.6: tena me assa kālaṅkiriyā, so mamassa antarāyo;
root_text.an5.77:2.7: handāhaṁ vīriyaṁ ārabhāmi appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāyā’ti.
root_text.an5.77:2.8: Idaṁ, bhikkhave, paṭhamaṁ anāgatabhayaṁ sampassamānena alameva āraññikena bhikkhunā appamattena ātāpinā pahitattena viharituṁ appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāya.
root_text.an5.77:3.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, āraññiko bhikkhu iti paṭisañcikkhati:
root_text.an5.77:3.4: upakkhalitvā vā papateyyaṁ, bhattaṁ vā bhuttaṁ me byāpajjeyya, pittaṁ vā me kuppeyya, semhaṁ vā me kuppeyya, satthakā vā me vātā kuppeyyuṁ,
root_text.an5.77:3.5: tena me assa kālaṅkiriyā, so mamassa antarāyo;
root_text.an5.77:3.6: handāhaṁ vīriyaṁ ārabhāmi appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāyā’ti.
root_text.an5.77:3.7: Idaṁ, bhikkhave, dutiyaṁ anāgatabhayaṁ sampassamānena alameva āraññikena bhikkhunā appamattena ātāpinā pahitattena viharituṁ appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāya.
root_text.an5.77:4.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, āraññiko bhikkhu iti paṭisañcikkhati:
root_text.an5.77:4.4: vāḷehi samāgaccheyyaṁ, sīhena vā byagghena vā dīpinā vā acchena vā taracchena vā, te maṁ jīvitā voropeyyuṁ,
root_text.an5.77:4.5: tena me assa kālaṅkiriyā, so mamassa antarāyo;
root_text.an5.77:4.6: handāhaṁ vīriyaṁ ārabhāmi appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāyā’ti.
root_text.an5.77:4.7: Idaṁ, bhikkhave, tatiyaṁ anāgatabhayaṁ sampassamānena alameva āraññikena bhikkhunā appamattena ātāpinā pahitattena viharituṁ appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāya.
root_text.an5.77:5.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, āraññiko bhikkhu iti paṭisañcikkhati:
root_text.an5.77:5.4: māṇavehi samāgaccheyyaṁ katakammehi vā akatakammehi vā, te maṁ jīvitā voropeyyuṁ,
root_text.an5.77:5.5: tena me assa kālaṅkiriyā, so mamassa antarāyo;
root_text.an5.77:5.6: handāhaṁ vīriyaṁ ārabhāmi appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāyā’ti.
root_text.an5.77:5.7: Idaṁ, bhikkhave, catutthaṁ anāgatabhayaṁ sampassamānena alameva āraññikena bhikkhunā appamattena ātāpinā pahitattena viharituṁ appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāya.
root_text.an5.77:6.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, āraññiko bhikkhu iti paṭisañcikkhati:
root_text.an5.77:6.3: Santi kho panāraññe vāḷā amanussā, te maṁ jīvitā voropeyyuṁ,
root_text.an5.77:6.4: tena me assa kālaṅkiriyā, so mamassa antarāyo;
root_text.an5.77:6.5: handāhaṁ vīriyaṁ ārabhāmi appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāyā’ti.
root_text.an5.77:6.6: Idaṁ, bhikkhave, pañcamaṁ anāgatabhayaṁ sampassamānena alameva āraññikena bhikkhunā appamattena ātāpinā pahitattena viharituṁ appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāya.
root_text.an5.77:7.1: Imāni kho, bhikkhave, pañca anāgatabhayāni sampassamānena alameva āraññikena bhikkhunā appamattena ātāpinā pahitattena viharituṁ appattassa pattiyā anadhigatassa adhigamāya asacchikatassa sacchikiriyāyā”ti.

translation_text.an5.77:1.1: “Mendicants, seeing these five future perils is quite enough for a wilderness mendicant to meditate diligently, keenly, and resolutely for attaining the unattained, achieving the unachieved, and realizing the unrealized.
translation_text.an5.77:2.3: ‘Currently I’m living alone in a wilderness.
translation_text.an5.77:2.5: I might get bitten by a snake, a scorpion, or a centipede.
translation_text.an5.77:2.6: And if I died from that it would be an obstacle to my progress.
translation_text.an5.77:2.7: I’d better rouse up energy for attaining the unattained, achieving the unachieved, and realizing the unrealized.’
translation_text.an5.77:2.8: This is the first future peril …
translation_text.an5.77:3.2: ‘Currently I’m living alone in a wilderness.
translation_text.an5.77:3.4: I might stumble off a cliff, or get food poisoning, or suffer a disturbance of bile, phlegm, or piercing winds.
translation_text.an5.77:3.5: And if I died from that it would be an obstacle to my progress.
translation_text.an5.77:3.6: I’d better rouse up energy for attaining the unattained, achieving the unachieved, and realizing the unrealized.’
translation_text.an5.77:3.7: This is the second future peril …
translation_text.an5.77:4.2: ‘Currently I’m living alone in a wilderness.
translation_text.an5.77:4.4: I might encounter wild beasts—a lion, a tiger, a leopard, a bear, or a hyena—which might take my life.
translation_text.an5.77:4.5: And if I died from that it would be an obstacle to my progress.
translation_text.an5.77:4.6: I’d better rouse up energy for attaining the unattained, achieving the unachieved, and realizing the unrealized.’
translation_text.an5.77:4.7: This is the third future peril …
translation_text.an5.77:5.2: ‘Currently I’m living alone in a wilderness.
translation_text.an5.77:5.4: I might encounter youths escaping a crime or on their way to commit one, and they might take my life.
translation_text.an5.77:5.5: And if I died from that it would be an obstacle to my progress.
translation_text.an5.77:5.6: I’d better rouse up energy for attaining the unattained, achieving the unachieved, and realizing the unrealized.’
translation_text.an5.77:5.7: This is the fourth future peril …
translation_text.an5.77:6.2: ‘Currently I’m living alone in a wilderness.
translation_text.an5.77:6.3: But in a wilderness there are savage monsters who might take my life.
translation_text.an5.77:6.4: And if I died from that it would be an obstacle to my progress.
translation_text.an5.77:6.5: I’d better rouse up energy for attaining the unattained, achieving the unachieved, and realizing the unrealized.’
translation_text.an5.77:6.6: This is the fifth future peril …
translation_text.an5.77:7.1: These are the five future perils, seeing which is quite enough for a wilderness mendicant to meditate diligently, keenly, and resolutely for attaining the unattained, achieving the unachieved, and realizing the unrealized.”

variant_text.an5.77:2.4: Ekakaṁ kho pana maṁ → ekakaṁ kho pana (sya-all, km) | vicchiko → vicchikā (sya-all)

reference_text.an5.77:1.1: bj20.162, csp1ed16.89, csp2ed16.89, ms16A5_498, msdiv77, ndp17.361, pts-vp-pli3.101
